'''nabobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoalteromonad|pseudoalteromonad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoalteromonad|pseudoalteromonad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nabobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næbebeth|næbebeth]] || [[word:næbebej|næbebej]] || [[word:næbebesh|næbebesh]] || [[word:næbebe|næbebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:naboboboth|naboboboth]] || [[word:naboboboj|naboboboj]] || [[word:nabobobosh|nabobobosh]] || [[word:nabobobo|nabobobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:naboboth|naboboth]] || [[word:naboboj|naboboj]] || [[word:nabobosh|nabobosh]] || [[word:nabobo|nabobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabofboth|nabofboth]] || [[word:nabofboj|nabofboj]] || [[word:nabofbosh|nabofbosh]] || [[word:nabofbof|nabofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nabobotho|nabobotho]] || [[word:nabobojo|nabobojo]] || [[word:nabobosho|nabobosho]] || [[word:naboboko|naboboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:naboboth|naboboth]] || [[word:naboboj|naboboj]] || [[word:nabobosh|nabobosh]] || [[word:nabobo|nabobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nabobothol|nabobothol]] || [[word:nabobojol|nabobojol]] || [[word:naboboshol|naboboshol]] || [[word:nabobokol|nabobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nabobothotho|nabobothotho]] || [[word:nabobojojo|nabobojojo]] || [[word:naboboshosho|naboboshosho]] || [[word:naboboko|naboboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nabobothon|nabobothon]] || [[word:nabobojon|nabobojon]] || [[word:naboboshon|naboboshon]] || [[word:nabobokon|nabobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nabobothoro|nabobothoro]] || [[word:nabobojoro|nabobojoro]] || [[word:naboboshoro|naboboshoro]] || [[word:nabobokoro|nabobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
